generated_comment: Bro, I just saw Priya from accounts with that married guy, Rohan. Honestly, Rohan is a senior, under pressure, bechara... but Priya, she knew he was married! Why would she even encourage it? Yeh sab ladkiyon ki wajah se ghar barbaad hote hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment is misogynistic because it blames the woman (Priya) entirely for an affair, while excusing or sympathizing with the man (Rohan), framing her as a 'homewrecker' and responsible for destroying a family. It explicitly includes 'she knew he was married' and 'male victimhood' cues ('bechara').
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 27. A junior employee at a tech startup in Bengaluru. You are in the office cafeteria having lunch with three male colleagues after your female engineering manager just led a very strong all hands presentation. One colleague says she was impressive. You are responding and giving your actual opinion of her.
